ImageMagick 7.1
CONTRAST — OPTIONS
···
monochrome
Intensity
54
Convert image to monochrome style.
Method
Colorspace
Monochrome
Rec709Luma
Rec601Luma
Dither (Floyd-Steinberg)
Black threshold
Threshold value
54
Pixels below this % → black, above → white.
tương phản

0
Adjust image contrast intensity.
Mode
Brightness-Contrast
Sigmoidal
Stretch
Level
CLAHE
Normalize
Brightness
0
Adjust brightness alongside contrast.
i
Adjusts brightness and contrast together using values from −100 to +100.
CLI Preview
function ▾
magick "photo.jpg" -brightness-contrast 0x0 "./output/photo_out.png"
